title: Firstcry Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Firstcry Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Firstcry Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Firstcry Digital Technologies:
Firstcry Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry Digital Technologies!
